text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
<chrname>'s race is drawing near.<n>I'm sure
we've done enough running<n>in preparation, but I
can't quite shake<n>off my anxieties...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I fret about whether our training<n>has been
enough to win, a certain<n>racer happens by...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's quite a stern look on your<n>face. Is
something the matter?
choice_data_list: I'm just feeling nervous, that's all...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. I can deeply relate to that state<n>of mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, it would be best not to<n>display your
unease so freely, lest it<n>make your trainee
anxious as well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, you two should have<n>confidence
in yourselves. The number<n>and quality of your
runs are second to<n>none.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Good results will surely follow, so be<n>calm in
your heart and rest assured. Of<n>course, I
suppose this is much easier<n>said than done.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There must be more I can do to<n>reassure you...
Ah, I have just the<n>idea. Tell me how you are
preparing<n>for your race.
choice_data_list: We're focusing on moderate speed training.

We're training hard to prepare for the worst
case scenario.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Focusing on speed while preserving<n>energy... I
see. Yes, I expected as<n>much. That's an
orthodox and logical<n>approach.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The path you have chosen is<n>well-traveled,
which, I suppose, is<n>precisely why you feel so
uneasy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But worry not. Staying on that path<n>will
undoubtedly lead to glory.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe you two have the strength to<n>follow the
road you've chosen. There<n>is no need to doubt
yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's words ease my<n>anxieties a
little, and I feel confidence<n>welling up within me
once more.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I see. So you're allaying those<n>fears of
yours by training intensely<n>and preparing for any
and all<n>possibilities.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Though it may not be the most<n>orthodox
approach, I can see how it<n>might be the best one
for your current<n>situation.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Once you lose yourself to the thrill of<n>the run, all
your fears, doubts, and<n>apprehensions will be left
behind in<n>the dust like forgotten sighs.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I believe you have made the right<n>choice. Go
forth and guide your racer<n>with confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's words ease my<n>anxieties a
little, and I feel confidence<n>welling up within me
once more.
